violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Observed home canned items in refrigerator behind bar.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of hamburger patties in freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of potatoes on floor of walk in cooler.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic tile on ceiling in food prep area that is neither smooth, nor cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor by fryer needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
